---
title: "2022 Article Edition"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: ../styles.css
    embed-resources: true
page-layout: full
---

[Back to viewer index](../index.html){.back-link}

<div class="pdf-frame-shell">
  <iframe src="_2022_article-edition.pdf" title="2022 Article Edition PDF" class="pdf-frame"></iframe>
</div>
